summary: Iteration 2 — Backend 49/49 pytest pass (31 regression + 18 new). Frontend mobile flows verified: forgot-password screen, settings (company/profile/GDPR rows), Reportes Ver PDF & Excel buttons (no más 'próxima versión'), material catalog FAB+modal for managers, photo activity feed renders thumbnails, role-separation enforced (worker has no FAB, no €).

issues: Console deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props (use boxShadow); props.pointerEvents (use style.pointerEvents). Non-blocking.

react_native_issues.issue: expo-file-system@55.0.17 (expected ~19.0.22), expo-sharing@55.0.18 (expected ~14.0.8) — Expo doctor warns. Web preview works fine but native build may need pinning.

action_items: (Optional) Pin expo-file-system and expo-sharing to versions matching installed Expo SDK (~19.0.22 / ~14.0.8) to silence doctor warnings and avoid native-build issues.
(Optional) Replace remaining shadow* style props with boxShadow and pointerEvents prop with style.pointerEvents to clear console deprecation noise.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1574 lines — strongly recommend splitting into routers (auth, projects, materials, logs, photos, reports, gdpr) before it becomes harder to maintain.
PDF & Excel generation is synchronous inside async endpoints — fine for current sizes but for >100 logs/entries should run in a thread pool (run_in_executor) to avoid blocking the event loop.
/api/auth/forgot-password logs the reset token to server logs only; UI must mention 'contact your admin' (already done). For production add an email service.
GDPR export correctly excludes image_base64 from photos_metadata and password_hash from users — verified via decoded JSON in test.
Reset-password issuance endpoint returns generic 'ok' for unknown emails — no enumeration. Good.
MongoDB _id stripped on every endpoint we tested. Good.
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_-prefixed material(s), one extra weekly report (POST /reports/weekly/generate), additional daily logs and a material entry. Profile/company PATCH overwrote demo values back to seed defaults. No destructive ops.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend BASE URL = https://site-glass-preview.preview.emergentagent.com (EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL). All Iteration-2 endpoints live: GET/PATCH /api/company, PATCH /api/profile, GET /api/gdpr/export, POST /api/auth/forgot-password, GET /api/reports/weekly/{rid}/{pdf|excel}. New file-download utility lives at /app/frontend/src/files.ts (web blob + expo-file-system fallback). Material catalog FAB testID = 'material-fab' (or 'add-material-fab'). Forgot-password route = /forgot-password. Run all tests: python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v. Note: Pydantic EmailStr requires real-looking TLDs (use example.com, NOT .test).
rca_of_issue: Only one transient test failure: TestForgotPassword.test_unknown_email_same_response returned 422 because Pydantic v2 EmailStr rejected 'doesnotexist@nowhere.test' as it considers '.test' invalid. Fixed by using 'doesnotexist@example.com'. Endpoint behaves correctly (still returns generic ok=True message → no user enumeration). Backend code is OK; this was purely a test-data correction.
